summary: ANDROID 🟥 Changes to some options are not properly propagated between mobile and PC part 2
scenario: Changes to voice prompt and tone options in Device Settings are not properly synchronized between mobile and PC due to incorrect bitmask handling.
description_clean: Changes to some options (Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore) are not properly propagated between mobile and PC when changed in Device Settings > Voice Prompts & Tones. Both platforms must use bitmasks correctly to ensure changes on one platform are propagated to every other platform.
steps: 3. Change one or more of the following options: Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore.
4. Observe the changes on the PC platform.
7. Change one or more of the same options on PC.
8. Observe the changes on the mobile platform.
expected: Changes made to the options (Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore) on one platform are correctly propagated to the other platform using proper bitmask handling.
actual: Changes to some options are not properly propagated between mobile and PC when changed in Device Settings > Voice Prompts & Tones.
